scope: Notion Skills Collection Type=Palette metadata from the latest reviewed local image batch; source images are not redistributed.

default_policy.promotion_rule: manual review plus cols4all/accessibility scoring required before moving into curated publication palettes
default_policy.source_asset_policy: Remote repository stores derived metadata only; source images are not committed.
default_policy.path_policy: Do not store user-local absolute paths or file mtimes in committed metadata.
